title: crepis × curiensis
intro: Crepis × curiensis, also known as the hybrid hawk's beard or Crepis × curiensis, is a rare hybrid plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting anti-microbial properties. Crepis × curiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
